tasks.title: Refactor create-market validation into testable helpers
tasks.prompt: Move the validation logic in market creation into focused, testable helpers while preserving existing behavior. Keep HTTP concerns thin and add or update tests.
notes: Prefer selective dependency injection only where the repo already uses it.
Use existing modelstesting helpers where applicable.

tasks.title: Check OpenAPI drift for market endpoints
tasks.prompt: Verify that the OpenAPI specification matches the implemented market endpoints and response shapes. Update the spec or code as needed and run contract checks.
